evals.prompt: Define SLOs for our payment processing API that handles $10M/month in transactions
assertions: defines SLIs for availability, latency, and correctness
sets appropriate SLO targets (high reliability for financial operations)
calculates error budget with monthly downtime allowance
recommends alerting on SLO burn rate

evals.prompt: Our e-commerce site goes down every Black Friday due to traffic spikes
assertions: analyzes failure mode (capacity, connections, cold starts)
recommends auto-scaling with pre-warming or provisioned capacity
suggests load shedding for non-critical features under pressure
recommends load testing at 2x expected peak before the event
